attempts.blocked_by: Six-nonce gap 1934-1939 that emerged DURING Phase C's gap-fill window. Local nonce-manager handed out 1937, 1938, 1939 to internal retries that failed pre-broadcast and were released with default kind='broadcast' (consumed) instead of 'rejected' (reusable) — see audit.md §root-cause for the failure-kind classification bug. Day 3 (1940) was the first acquire that successfully reached mempool. Stuck behind 1937-1939 phantoms until Phase C-bis.

confirmed_by_phase: C-bis (gap-fill of nonces 1934-1939 broadcast 2026-04-27T~14:30Z; Day 3 confirmed in same block 7765275)
note: Day 3 brief + payout cycle ran end-to-end during the recovery window for Day 1+Day 2. Compile fired at 05:02Z, inscribe pipeline ran 07:02-08:56Z, payout fired at 09:02Z, broadcast at nonce 1940 — but stuck behind the new 1934-1939 phantom gap. Phase C-bis cleared the gap; Day 3 confirmed in the same block as the C-bis fills.
